profile.technical: Requests access to basic profile claims.

email.technical: Requests access to the user's email address.

offline_access.technical: Requests refresh-token style access that may persist after the session.
offline_access.plain_language: keep access after you leave the application

drive.technical: Represents broad cloud-drive access in this demo catalog.
drive.plain_language: access files in your cloud drive

mail.send.technical: Allows sending mail as the user.

calendar.readwrite.technical: Allows reading and modifying calendar data.

user.read.technical: Allows reading basic user account information.
